review.verdict: Valuable for Japanese merchants leveraging Rakuten loyalty, but PayPay edges it on raw reach now.
review.best_for: Japanese merchants targeting the Rakuten ecosystem and points-using customers
review.not_for: Merchants outside Japan or prioritizing maximum wallet reach over loyalty
